message:
feat(deps): add frankensearch + franken-agent-detection as workspace dependencies with feature gates

Integrates two /dp Rust tools into FrankenTerm's workspace as optional,
feature-gated dependencies — the first concrete step in the ft-dr6zv
integration epic.

FrankenSearch (frankensearch):
- Added as git dependency with "hybrid" feature set (hash + model2vec +
  fastembed + lexical) for full two-tier progressive search capability
- Pinned to rev 3ad4326, using asupersync patch for version alignment
- tantivy downgraded from 0.25 → 0.22 to match frankensearch's dependency
- Feature flag "frankensearch" gates the dep in frankenterm-core
- search_bridge module declared in lib.rs behind cfg(feature)

franken-agent-detection (v0.1.0 from crates.io):
- Synchronous filesystem probes for 9 coding agents (claude, codex,
  gemini, cursor, cline, opencode, aider, windsurf, continue)
- Feature flag "agent-detection" gates the dep in frankenterm-core
- agent_detection.rs re-exports the crate for stable internal module path

Both features are default-on so workspace builds include them; use
--no-default-features to compile without.

Implements: ft-dr6zv.1.1, ft-dr6zv.2.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+//! Feature-gated adapter for filesystem-based coding agent detection.
+//!
+//! This re-exports `franken-agent-detection` through `frankenterm-core` so
+//! internal callers can use a stable module path as higher-level inventory
+//! integration evolves.
+
+pub use franken_agent_detection::*;
